task_completion.description: Set the SENSOR_POD mass to 3.2 kg
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree, under SENSOR_POD > physics > Physics, the 'mass' field is set to 3.2.

task_completion.description: Add a Damping node with specific linear and angular damping
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree, under SENSOR_POD > physics > Physics > damping, a Damping node is present with 'linearDamping' set to 0.95 and 'angularDamping' set to 0.6.

task_completion.description: Update ALTIMETER DistanceSensor type to 'laser' and maxRange to 150.0
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree, under SENSOR_POD > children, the DistanceSensor named 'ALTIMETER' has its 'type' field set to "laser" and 'maxRange' set to 150.
In the Webots scene tree, under the 'ALTIMETER' DistanceSensor, the 'rotation' field is set to '0 1 0 -1.5708'.

task_completion.description: Add a Receiver node named 'abort_receiver' on channel 7
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree, under SENSOR_POD > children, a Receiver node is present with its 'name' field set to "abort_receiver" and 'channel' set to 7.

task_completion.description: Save the configured world to the Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Webots window title shows 'airdrop_configured.wbt', or a file manager/terminal shows the file 'airdrop_configured.wbt' exists in /home/ga/Desktop/.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Webots GUI or a legitimate text editor to modify the world file
integrity.visual_evidence: The Webots application interface is visible with the scene tree open, or a text editor (like VS Code or gedit) is used to edit the .wbt file directly.

integrity.description: Agent manually configured the settings rather than using a shortcut script
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen manually changing values in the Webots interface or typing them in a text editor, rather than running a pre-written script that instantly generates the output file.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely saved the file to the requested path
integrity.visual_evidence: A 'Save World As...' dialog in Webots or a terminal command confirming the file was saved to the correct Desktop path, not just mocked in a text output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is /home/ga/Desktop/airdrop_configured.wbt. The SENSOR_POD must have a mass of 3.2, linear damping of 0.95, and angular damping of 0.6. The ALTIMETER DistanceSensor must have type 'laser', maxRange 150.0, and rotation '0 1 0 -1.5708'. The Receiver node must be named 'abort_receiver' and set to channel 7.
